title: Extravaganza 7 The Last Laugh
description: Extravaganza 7 is Fringe’s final blowout! Sister Brandy Bex and the ever-fabulous Stella Pint return for a riotous cabaret fundraiser in aid of Dementia UK (registered charity in England and Wales, 1039404). Comedy takes centre stage, but expect surprises, mishaps, and pure energy. Supporting dementia awareness, this afternoon is all about laughs and heart. As the last hurrah before awards night, it’s where legends collide and chaos reigns. Come for the cabaret, stay for the carnage!

venue.name: Klub Kaput at Caravanserai
venue.address: North of St Peter's Church, York Place, East Sussex
